Off Calendar Jan-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories is denied as moot. The court will not determine the adequacy of the responses on this motion. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied as the court finds circumstances which make the imposition of sanctions unjust. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
